{{CargoRelic
|name=Ulysses
|class_id=22320
|rank=SSS
|affct=CIV
|birthday=04-27
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.11%)
|description=On Apr 27, 1922 AD, Irish writer Joyce completed Ulysses.<br>Three parts and eighteen chapters make up the novel Ulysses, which is a chronological description of a day in the lives of three common Dubliners. To reflect the consciousness of the characters, Joyce wrote a lot of interior monologues. These monologues' content is all-inclusive, combining a wide range of strange and complex feelings and desires into one that comes across as incredibly genuine, giving the reader a sense of reality. This novel is regarded as the forerunner of the stream-of-consciousness novel and has had a significant impact on the development of modernist literature.
|fame=76
|art=64
|fth=63
|civ=108
|tech=51
|ss1=Mutant Minion HP +3%<br>Mutant Minion DEF +3%<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +9
|ss2=Mutant Minion HP +4%<br>Mutant Minion DEF +4%<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +18
|ss3=Mutant Minion HP +5%<br>Mutant Minion DEF +5%<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +27
|ss4=Mutant Minion HP +7%<br>Mutant Minion DEF +7%<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +45
|ss5=Mutant Minion HP +9%<br>Mutant Minion DEF +9%<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +63
|ss6=Mutant Minion HP +12%<br>Mutant Minion DEF +12%<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +90
|ss7=Mutant Minion HP +12%<br>Mutant Minion DEF +12%<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +90<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +90 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, Water DMG +300
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x Orange Reagent Drops +6%
|skill3=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, Snail ATK +600
|mirage={{Mirage|name=The Past of Dublin|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|Grandmaster Scroll, +40|orange}}
|3name=Boylan|3rec=95.25M|3atk=266668|3defense=177905|3hp=17445525|3weak=33613
|4name=Bloom|4rec=123.41M|4atk=326052|4defense=217522|4hp=24676594|4weak=37880
|5name=Molly|5rec=155.82M|5atk=394400|5defense=263120|5hp=33752825|5weak=42978
|6name=Stephen|6rec=192.48M|6atk=471711|6defense=314697|6hp=45734145|6weak=48911
|Arec=234.74M|Aatk=560227|Adefense=373750|Ahp=60244495|Aweak=54698
}}}}
